value.0:
This smooth gem is cool to the touch and is only procured through the sneakiest means possible.  

There may be many hidden uses for this gem, if you will find them you will be delighted beyond compare!

This smooth gem is cool to the touch and is only procured through the sneakiest means possible.  

There may be many hidden uses for this gem, if you will find them you will be delighted beyond compare!

Often called the "Poor Man's Ruby," this faceted garnet is nevertheless a distinct and attractive blood-red gem in its own right. The violet form, also called rhodolite, is the rarest, most prized, and most valuable form of the stone.
